game_name: The Simpsons: Bart vs. the World

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Resource management (up to 5 hits before death)

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Each stage in all four worlds
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Required for best ending and bonus Hollywood level unlock
Limited-duration flight ability for traversal and evasion
Pattern-based combat with Fu Manchu Burns, Abominable Snow Burns, Ramses Burns, Eric von Burns

typical_relief_triggers: Encountering Bartman cape for brief invulnerability through flight
Reaching interstitial map screen between worlds
typical_tension_triggers: Enemy encounters requiring firecracker projectile defense
Health depletion approaching fifth hit threshold
Mandatory souvenir collection creates exploration tension
Blind jumps and far-reaching platforming challenges
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Moderate pacing with puzzle-light exploration interrupting action sequences; minigames and NPC interactions provide relief between combat-heavy stages

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Souvenir locations require exploration; secondary collectibles (firecracker, Squishees) distributed throughout levels

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory platforming mechanics with basic enemy encounters; health resources available
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increased enemy density; mandatory souvenir collection requires thorough exploration; minigames introduce puzzle-solving requirements
difficulty_curve.late_game: Boss encounters with Burns family members; platforming challenges escalate; knowledge-based trivia minigames test series familiarity
notable_spikes: Each world's final stage boss encounter
Trivia minigames based on Season 1-2 episode events (series knowledge barrier)

notable_level_patterns.description: Game divided into geographically themed worlds: China, North Pole, Egypt, Hollywood. Each world contains multiple stages culminating in boss fight
notable_level_patterns.example_level: China world stages leading to Fu Manchu Burns boss

notable_level_patterns.description: Mandatory collection mechanic: one Krusty-brand souvenir per stage required for best ending; creates exploration incentive and replay value
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All stages across all four worlds

notable_level_patterns.description: Card matching and Simpsons trivia games placed between or within stages to provide gameplay variety and pacing relief
notable_level_patterns.example_level: One minigame per major world area

notable_level_patterns.description: Each of four worlds terminates in unique Burns family member boss battle; acts as difficulty gate to next world
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Final stage of China (Fu Manchu Burns), North Pole (Abominable Snow Burns), Egypt (Ramses Burns), Hollywood (Eric von Burns)
